11127:11354.name: Splash screen should match size, position, and corner radius of home screen (when possible) - enabling a seamless transition between the two.
11127:11354.text_content: Splash screen should match size, position, and corner radius of home screen (when possible) - enabling a seamless transition between the two.

11127:11355.name: If splash screen is displayed for more than 3 seconds, the loading icon will be displayed.
11127:11355.text_content: If splash screen is displayed for more than 3 seconds, the loading icon will be displayed.

11127:11356.name: In this example, the homepage is 1378x735px. The splash screen should be 1378x735px as well.
11127:11356.text_content:
In this example, the homepage is 1378x735px.
The splash screen should be 1378x735px as well.

11211:706987.text_content: Connect your USB wireless receiver to your system

11211:706996.name: Title
11211:706996.text_content: Wear your earbuds and pinch and hold both earbuds at the same time for 3 seconds

11211:707005.text_content: Pairing will automatically begin after a few seconds

8015:24111.name: Enhances the meeting join experience in conference BYOD scenarios and personal workspaces by automating the join process. It securely integrates with Microsoft Outlook Calendars to streamline meeting access.
8015:24111.text_content: Enhances the meeting join experience in conference BYOD scenarios and personal workspaces by automating the join process. It securely integrates with Microsoft Outlook Calendars to streamline meeting access.

8015:24112.name: The DDPM VCRS UI offers an intuitive interface for enabling or disabling the Single Click Join feature. When users enable this feature in the DDPM VCRS tab, they can securely perform a one-time authentication to their Outlook Calendar via WebView2, eliminating the need for an external browser. When the video bar is connected and active, a minimal window will display upcoming meeting details and a Join button for quick access. If authentication is required again, the UI will prompt the user with a clear and secure authentication window via WebView2, without redirecting to an external browser.
8015:24112.text_content:
The DDPM VCRS UI offers an intuitive interface for enabling or disabling the Single Click Join feature. 

When users enable this feature in the DDPM VCRS tab, they can securely perform a one-time authentication to their Outlook Calendar via WebView2, eliminating the need for an external browser.

When the video bar is connected and active, a minimal window will display upcoming meeting details and a Join button for quick access.

If authentication is required again, the UI will prompt the user with a clear and secure authentication window via WebView2, without redirecting to an external browser.

8015:24127.name: If the user connects the video bar... Before or when the meeting starts: When the meeting time starts (potentially give the user choice) Potentially give user the choice when they want to see the notification (e.g., 1-5 minutes before) After the meeting start time, show notification as long as the meeting time is still occurring
8015:24127.text_content:
If the user connects the video bar...
 Before or when the meeting starts: When the meeting time starts (potentially give the user choice)
Potentially give user the choice when they want to see the notification (e.g., 1-5 minutes before)
After the meeting start time, show notification as long as the meeting time is still occurring

8015:24128.name: If the user has more than one meeting occurring at the same time, they will receive a notification in which all meetings are displayed and a scroll bar may appear if needed. We may consider showing users all meetings on their calendar by default but give them the option to only see meetings they’ve accepted, marked as tentative, declined, didn’t respond to
8015:24128.text_content:
If the user has more than one meeting occurring at the same time, they will receive a notification in which all meetings are displayed and a scroll bar may appear if needed.
We may consider showing users all meetings on their calendar by default but give them the option to only see meetings they’ve accepted, marked as tentative, declined, didn’t respond to

8015:24129.name: We would like to use a sound and give the user the option to turn off the sound.
8015:24129.text_content: We would like to use a sound and give the user the option to turn off the sound.

8015:24150.name: Review Product with Engineer Team Session 1
8015:24150.text_content: Review Product with Engineer Team Session 1

8015:24188.name: Single Click Join On/Off Notification Options Timing 1-5 minutes before Response provided Accepted only Any response
8015:24188.text_content:
